title: dioscorea uruapanensis
intro: Dioscorea uruapanensis, a perennial tuberous plant, is a member of the Dioscoreaceae family and is commonly known as a wild yam. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dioscorea uruapanensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Dioscorea uruapanensis is traditionally prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be found in herbal supplements or capsules, offering a convenient way to harness its medicinal properties.
